title: Type resolution error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bam.alignments_3 (virtual_offset BIGINT NOT NULL, qname TEXT NOT NULL, flag SMALLINT NOT NULL, rname TEXT NOT NULL, pos INTEGER NOT NULL, epos INTEGER NOT NULL, mapq SMALLINT NOT NULL, cigar TEXT NOT NULL, rnext TEXT NOT NULL, pnext INTEGER NOT NULL, tlen INTEGER NOT NULL, seq TEXT NOT NULL, qual TEXT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT alignments_3_pkey_virtual_offset PRIMARY KEY (virtual_offset));

INSERT INTO bam.alignments_3 (virtual_offset, qname, flag, rname, pos, epos, mapq, cigar, rnext, pnext, tlen, seq, qual) VALUES (1, 'query1', 0, 'ref1', 100, 200, 60, '4M', 'ref2', 150, 50, 'ACTG', 'IIII');
ALTER TABLE bam.alignments_3 ALTER COLUMN virtual_offset SET NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bam.alignments_3 WHERE mapq IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Setting table to read-only before dropping it
